user_types: Jason (sole validator: judges per-row result via batched Telegram digest; sole authority for not-applicable, justification required)
Claude conductor (derives ConOps, drafts rows at Phase 7, assembles evidence, calls mark_system_validation_complete)
Future system-altitude sessions (consumers of the process)
features: ConOps derivation: roadmap user stories (US-n) -> roadmap/conops.md; re-derived/refreshed at Phase 7 emission, hash-bound late (drift defense)

Validation-row drafting at Phase 7 (pre-implementation, anti-relabeling defense): scenario + oracle + per-row evidence_type from a taxonomy (live-walkthrough / artifact-demo / narrative), chosen per row with rationale
Phase 8 close: evidence assembly per row, batched Telegram digest, Jason judges results, write system_validation.json, call mark_system_validation_complete, then session Finalization->Completed
Fail policy: remediate-then-re-gate (remediation task cards, re-exercise, regenerate rows, re-run gate)
N/A policy: Jason-only with recorded justification in oracle field; Claude may propose, never set
Oracle quality bar + gauntlet attacks on row quality (validation-theater defense)
integrations: Phase docs 02 (US-n ids), 07 (conops emission + row drafting), 08 (gate + close)
unknowns: Evidence-type taxonomy boundaries and per-type minimum bar
Dogfood mechanics: how a docs/process session's own stories produce non-relabeled validation scenarios
Whether ConOps needs narrative beyond concatenated user stories to satisfy 50-byte/Appx-S intent

framework_profile.framework: Claude Code skill: Python scripts under skills/adversarial-spec/scripts/

subprofiles.error_model: exit 0/2/3; one stdout JSON envelope {status, code, issues, data} per invocation (FM-5)

framework_profile.enforcement_model: module-enforced shape validation mirroring fizzy gate; module-extracted sender id vs registry allowed_sender_ids on inbound replies (SEC-1/SEC-2), fail-closed config

story_alignment.rationale: single entry point serves repeatable-process goal
late ConOps derivation is G4 verbatim
pre-implementation rows satisfy anti-hindsight + gate schema
intent-based oracles; NG5 reinforced not violated
async evidence taxonomy keeps Jason cost to one digest
deterministic reply grammar supports sole-oracle judgment
mechanical close path serves V-close goal; NG1 conformance
remediation loop required for satisfiable close
local self-check explicitly permitted by NG4 carve-out
auditable refresh rule is G5 verbatim
executed evidence before digest keeps judgment grounded in intent

research_findings.finding: gate reject classes, _sha256_prefix bidirectional prefix-match, strict-subset anti-relabeling, result enum accepts not-applicable
established pattern: doc-driven process, code-checked shapes, structured exit codes
wrapper does no message splitting; raw 4096-char Telegram limit; 3500-char budget chosen
advisory locks released on process death; 10s timeout pattern pinned at 3.16.1 skill-wide

reconciliation.reason: spec drifted v4->v5->FINAL via gauntlet revision + finalize; deltas applied to target-architecture.md and architecture-invariants.json in place per Jason directive (reconcile, not rerun)

dimensions.name: execution model
dimensions.rationale: mirrors mini_spec_emission.py pattern; NG4 forbids servers

dimensions.name: concurrency
dimensions.value: filelock + atomic rename, single mutating writer
dimensions.rationale: established TASK_LOCK pattern; crash-safe by construction

dimensions.name: error model
dimensions.rationale: LLM conductor needs machine-readable issues for the playbook

dimensions.name: I/O
dimensions.value: JSON ledger + markdown artifacts + Telegram part files

dimensions.name: testing architecture
dimensions.value: pytest over module; dogfood validation of process itself
dimensions.rationale: verification=pytest, validation=US-10 dogfood, disjoint by construction
